title: PNJB Puffer Luminous Caterpillars Toy, Light Up, Fidget Toys for Kids, Flashing Light, Toy Activity And Play, Sensory Toy, Finger toy, Squishy Toys, LED Fidget Toy, Random Colour, (8PCS)
features: DESIGN INSPIRATION: Puffer worms draw inspiration from the adorable features of pufferfish and the flexibility of worms. They combine the round, puffy shape of pufferfish with the wriggly, elongated form of worms, resulting in a unique and captivating design.

MATERIAL AND TEXTURE: These fidget toys are crafted from good-quality, soft silicone or rubber materials to ensure a satisfying tactile experience. The surface may feature a variety of textures, including smooth areas for gentle rubbing and raised bumps or ridges for added sensory stimulation.

SQUEEZABILITY AND FLEXIBILITY: Puffer worms are designed to be highly squeezable and flexible, allowing kids to squish, stretch, and manipulate them in various ways. The soft, pliable nature of the material makes it easy for children to mold the toy into different shapes or simply enjoy the sensation of squeezing it between their fingers.

STRESS RELIEF & SENSORY EXPLORATION: Puffer worm fidget toys serve as effective tools for stress relief and sensory exploration. As children interact with the toys through tactile manipulation, they engage their senses and experience a calming effect that helps reduce anxiety and promote relaxation.

VERSATILITY AND PORTABILITY: These toys are versatile enough to be used in various settings, whether at home, in school, or on the go. Their compact size and lightweight construction make them easily portable, allowing kids to carry them in their pockets or backpacks for instant access to soothing sensory stimulation whenever needed.
description: Product Description DESIGN INSPIRATION Inspired by the vibrant colors and glowing patterns of bioluminescent caterpillars found in nature. MATERIAL AND TEXTURE Made from soft, stretchy, and durable silicone with a bumpy, puffer-like texture that enhances tactile stimulation. SQUEEZABILITY AND FLEXIBILITY Designed to be easily squeezable and highly flexible, allowing for endless squishing, stretching, and bending without losing shape. STRESS RELIEF & SENSORY EXPLORATION Provides soothing stress relief and engages the senses through its glowing colors, squishy texture, and satisfying tactile feedback.
